cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this problem step by step. So the question is asking between what times could Jennifer have gone to the swimming pool today. The options are given as A, B, C, D. Let me start by listing out all the information provided. First, Jennifer woke up at 5am. Then, Richard saw her working at the office from 5am to 8am. So that means from 5 to 8, she's at the office. Then Samantha saw her reading at the library from 12pm to 1pm. So 12 to 1, she's at the library. Betty saw her buying a bike at the bike shop from 1pm to 2pm. So 1 to 2, she's at the bike shop. Sarah saw her buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm. That's a long time—so from 2 to 9, she's at the electronics store. Then Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm.
